reviews.title: Worked out well for our Kits

reviews.title: Well made, hygienically packaged, and effective
reviews.text:
These toothbrush kits are great for travel, small clean-up projects, or for house guests. The brush heads are rather large compared to other brushes on the market but they do a good job cleaning. The brush handle is easy to hold and bristles are soft to medium.

I really like that each toothbrush is individually wrapped and include a small tube of toothpaste that taste decent and gets the job done. These are great for the homeless, shelters, bed and breakfasts, etc. I don’t know when this package expires but there is a date on the crimp of the toothpaste that reads “2025 04.” I’ll be sure to donate them well before April 2025 to be on the safe side. Great product, well made, and effective!

title: Initio Sonic Electric Toothbrush for Adults Rechargeable Toothbrush with Smart Timer 5 Modes 3 Brush Heads 40,000 VPM Motor Whitening Power Toothbrush IT959 (Navy Blue)
features: [5 High-Performance Brushing Modes] Electric toothbrush with 5 modes of intelligence for adults and kids,including White, Clean, Sensitive, Polish, Massage to suit different conditions of teeth of gums. You can choose different modes for your electric toothbrush according to your gum conditions and preferences. Initio sonic electric toothbrush is also a perfect Valentine's Day gift.

[Powerful Sonic Cleaning Effect] This electric toothbrush with the latest sonic technology delivers 40,000 strokes per minute.The sonic technology allows the fluid to gently clean between the teeth and the gum line, the Initio electric toothbrush cleaning effect is 10 times that of manual toothbrushes and 3 times that of ordinary electric toothbrushes. People who smoke or drink tea all the year round can also get brighter teeth by sticking with this electric toothbrush.

[2 Minutes Smart Timer] The electric toothbrush built in smart timer control,pause every 30 seconds to remind the user to change the cleaning area. 2 minutes auto shut off as the brush time recommend by dentist. The rechargeable electric toothbrush can let you get the sweetest smile in the shortest time.

[IPX7 Waterproof and Light Weight Design] Rechargeable electric toothbrush with IPX7 rated waterproof design, so you can safely use the electric toothbrush in the bath or shower. No worry about the water would enter the charge ports to short the battery life. Also,when in use this electric toothbrush, you can feel the comfort and lightness and experience the details of the electric toothbrush design.

[Full Charging for 45 Days Using] This Sonic Electric Toothbrush can run for 45 days after eight hours of charging.The lightweight body design and USB charging interface make this electric toothbrush the best choice for travel-portable and convenient. Great for carrying and traveling. Also one of the best choices as a gift. Please kindly know that the package DO NOT include the AC Adaptor.

reviews.title: Great Electric Toothbrush
reviews.text: Very happy with this Sonic electric toothbrush. I like all the different speeds. Very simple and quick to charge and would be easy to travel with and charge. Nice snap cover for the brush making it easier to pack the brush for travel.  Timer mode works great encouraging me not to be in such a hurry brushing my teeth.

reviews.title: Lightweight brush that packs a punch
reviews.text:
What I like:

-lightweight and compact in size
-only one button to cycle through modes and turn it off
-comes with (3) brush heads
-includes USB power cord
-will fit in my toothbrush holder

What I don't like:

-need to buy power adapter to charge it

This isn't a fancy sonic toothbrush. If you're looking for a basic electric toothbrush that's a step above the type you'd buy at the grocery store (that takes two AA batteries - you know the one), this will do it. The toothbrush cleaned my teeth well with a good amount of vibration of the bristles. I'm pretty pleased.

reviews.title: Toothbrush
reviews.text: [[VIDEOID:fa007684a8fa5379afdcdb30ceda64f4]] At first I couldn’t get over the vibration, but after using it a couple times I couldn’t get over how polished & white my teeth were! This toothbrush has become top tier in my dental hygiene. 10/10

reviews.title: Edit: Good for my 2 year old
reviews.text:
I realize it says it's a kids toothbrush but it's huge! It's bigger than a regular sized brush for adults. I intended this for my 2 year old for Christmas. It's my fault for not looking at details. I've been searching for an Olaf one and this was on sale. I have not tried it but will update when we do...

Update: I gave this to my daughter early because she saw Olaf. It does fit in her mouth and the on/off buttons are easy for her to push. It's her favorite color, purple. She actually brushes her teeth. Well the toothbrush does the work! I don't see a timer on it. So far, the battery is doing fine. My biggest concern is replacing the head. It's already looking like I should replace.

High Quality & Effective Clean – MERUYOO toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonicare are made with end-rounded Dupont Nylon Bristles to ensure a thorough and effective clean. The soft, rounded bristles gently clean and polish your teeth and gums, while the advanced design allows for better reach and coverage of hard-to-reach areas.

Gentle Bristles & Gum Health – MERUYOO toothbrush heads for Philips Sonicare with special contoured soft bristles fit the shape of your teeth and gums, can help to effectively remove plaque and promote overall oral health. Indicator Bristles – MERUYOO electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips sonicare will fade after 3 months of use when a replacement is needed. Blue soft indicator bristles will fade when it's time to replace.

Individually Wrapped & Travel – Each electric toothbrush replacement heads for Philips Sonic-care is separately packed in a bag and equipped with clear hygienic cover protecting bristles against dust and bacteria for easy storage and travel.

reviews.title: They’re ok…
reviews.text: Of the many compatible replacement heads I’ve tried, this set isn’t my favorite. It doesn’t feel as sturdy as some of the other brands I’ve tried, and rattles a bit. But it does work.

reviews.title: Make my Sonicare ineffective
reviews.text:
The toothbrush heads I received have yellow bristles in place of the advertised green. The color doesn’t matter much to me, but I’m curious if the yellow will work the way the green do and give an indication it’s time to change the brush head? Time will tell.

While I don’t mind the color, I do mind the fact that these brush heads don’t do the same sort of job brushing as do the name brand, or even other non-name brand replacements I’ve used. They fit on my Sonicare brush okay, but when I use it, it doesn’t vibrate nearly as fast or feel like it’s cleaning my teeth the way it should. While using it, I had to fight the urge to start brushing like I would with a manual toothbrush since I didn’t feel like it was doing much of anything to clean my teeth. My Sonicare seems sort of weak and ineffective with this head attached, and it’s not the Sonicare itself, because when I put the old brush head back on, it worked as expected.

reviews.title: Just as good as the name brand!
reviews.text: These replacement toothbrush heads are just as good as the Philips Sonicare ones I've bought in the past. If I closed my eyes I wouldn't know the difference. I'm definitely buying these again, plus they are close to half the price!

reviews.title: Functional And Sturdy
reviews.text: These replacement heads for Sonicare E-Series Toothbrushes arrived individually wrapped.  All of the plastic surfaces are smooth and finished.  The bristles are smooth.  They fit my Sonicare Essence perfectly, and screwed on to the handle easily.  The head of the brush is small, and fits into the back corners of my mouth easily.  They clean my teeth just as well as the name brand replacement heads, for a considerably lower price.  I would definitely recommend them.

reviews.title: Best Sonicare Replacement Heads Yet!
reviews.text: To be fair, this is the second brand I've ever tried, but still, significantly better! Reason one, these are infinitely less expensive than the Up and Up brand replacements, I bought a few years ago. I only received 3 heads for $30, compared to the 6 I received with this brand for $20. Reason two is the fit. The Up and Up brand heads weren't a perfect fit and chattered like crazy whenever I used them, which was less than ideal. These new heads are as silent as the original Sonicare head was out of the box. If you need to switch out your old worn-out head, save yourself some time and money and give these a try.

reviews.title: Nice mouth feel too
reviews.text: These are sturdy enough to get debris out and still just long enough to work around appliances.  Doesn't hurt my gums, actually, feels good to brush

reviews.title: Works Great On Braces, My Kids Like Them, Brush Cover
reviews.text:
I got this Ortho Standard 33 orthodontic toothbrush almost two months ago and decided to get this value pack. My kids have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, and since using these it’s been better. I don’t notice food stuck or buildup on their brackets.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles or handles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help brush teeth better while having braces.

reviews.title: My Kids Like It, The Brush Head Cover is A Bonus
reviews.text:
I got the Ortho Standard 33 for my kids because they have trouble properly cleaning around their brackets, I was hoping these would help due to the design of them.

I can’t speak from personal experience using them because I don’t have braces but my kids like them. They said that they’re soft and help to clean their teeth better with having braces. They also mentioned that it’s comfortable to hold.

I like the clear design but would prefer colored bristles to easily identify household toothbrushes.

The cover for the toothbrush head is great to have!

I’d say that they work as described and worth giving a try to help better brush teeth while having braces.

reviews.title: It works great
reviews.text: This toothbrush works great to clean around those brackets!

reviews.title: Good design for brushing with braces
reviews.text: I got these for my young adult son who wears braces, and he is very pleased with them. The size of the brush is just right for maneuvering around teeth and braces. The bristles are angled which makes it helpful to thoroughly remove food and tartar for someone with braces. I like that there is a pack of 6, so that there is always a new toothbrush available when the current one needs to be replaced.

title: Philips Sonicare ProtectiveClean 5300 Rechargeable Electric Power Toothbrush, Black, HX6423/34
description: Improve your gum health up to 100% better than a manual toothbrush with the ProtectiveClean 5300 rechargeable electric toothbrush. It has a pressure sensor that protects teeth and gums from excess brushing pressure. Customize your own brushing experience with your choice of 3 modes: Clean, White and Gum Care. Our BrushSync technology tracks how long you have been using your Optimal Gum Care brush head and how hard you have been brushing. Your electric toothbrush will beep to inform you when to replace your brush head. The easy-start feature slowly increases the power of the brush as you get used to the Sonicare experience and the SmarTimer encourages a full 2 minute brushing time as recommended by your dental professional. The battery indicator light lets you know when it is time recharge; 2 week battery life. The kit includes 1 ProtectiveClean 5300 handle, 1 Optimal Gum Care brush head, 1 charger, 1 travel case, and 2 extra DiamondClean brush heads. reviews.title: Great product
reviews.text: Love this toothbrush

reviews.title: Hate the feeling
reviews.text:
Picked this up alongside an OralB toothbrush to compare and...I don't understand why people like the Sonicare toothbrushes.

I've seen people say that you have to get used to the feeling, but it just feels awful. Not even necessarily the regular use, but if you accidentally touch the plastic to your teeth you get a horrible vibration feeling that shoots through your jaw/entire head. It also feels awful if you touch it on your lips on accident, too.

This alone made me return it in favor of the Oral B.

SUSTAINABLE: Every order is packaged in recyclable cardboard and carbon offset with our environmentally friendly partners

SENSORY FRIENDLY: For individuals with oral sensitivities that may make it difficult to use toothbrushes with nylon bristles, our silicone bristle option offers a perfect solution that provides gentle yet effective oral care

reviews.title: Soft for gums and tiny teeth.
reviews.text: Cute little tooth brush for babies to learn with. Not going to hurt gums if they start to chew on it. Can see a two year old learning to brush well after tries as a baby with this safe brush.

reviews.title: Love the design
reviews.text: Its so cute and the bristles are soft so its perfect for a toddler.

reviews.title: Great size...
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are the perfect size for toddlers.  The bristles are soft and the handle is made of a combination of hard plastic and silicone, so it’s easy to grip.  The optional silicone guard is perfect for helping little ones learn how to control the brush.  And, each brush has a suction cup on the end of the handle, so it’s easy to stand them up in the bathroom counter.  My only issue is that one of the brushes got smashed during delivery and the silicone guard is bent inwards...it will probably pop out in time, so really only a minor issue.  Overall, nice infant to toddler toothbrushes!

reviews.title: One of my favorite toddler toothbrushes
reviews.text: I really love how theses have the guards. My nephew has special needs so while he's 8, he physically is like an infant. We are teaching him how to hold a toothbrush and brush his own teeth. This is great because he always puts too much in his mouth and ends up choking. If you have a new leader to brushing teeth this is most definitely will be your saving grace.

title: Oral-B 8000 Electric Toothbrush with Bluetooth Connectivity, White
description: Use the Oral-B App to seamlessly pair your Genius 8000 with a smartphone and you're on your way to brushing like your dentist recommends. The Oral-B Genius 8000 comes with Position Detection technology which uses Bluetooth technology, your smartphone, and facial recognition technology to provide you with real-time feedback about your brushing habits. The 360 Smarting with LED lights allows you to personalize your brushing experience with your choice of 12 colors. The Smarting works with the integrated timer and pressure sensor to provide you with visual feedback on brushing time and brushing pressure. Together, they help you ensure you brush for the recommended 2-minutes while making sure you brush with appropriate pressure to protect your gums from over-brushing. The premium Smart Travel Case lets you charge your brush and smartphone (via USB) at the same time while using only one wall plug. The Genius features 6 brushing modes so you can further customize your brushing experience based on your specific oral care goals. This highly advanced brush features a dentist-inspired round head that surrounds and cups each tooth with dynamic oscillating, rotating and pulsating movements to remove up to 500% more plaque than a regular manual toothbrush. Trust in the precision engineering of Braun and the dental expertise of Oral-B, the #1 brand used and recommended by dentists worldwide. 100% Satisfaction Guaranteed.
features: Position Detection to help you know where you've brushed, so you never miss a zone
Multicolor Smarting on electric toothbrush provides coaching on brushing time

reviews.title: Tb
reviews.text: Stop working after two months. What a waste.

reviews.title: Disappointing
reviews.text:
for a top model priced as such, i was a disappointed in the feature set....no UV system to sterilize the brush head. Travel pack and main stand run on two different power systems...travel pack runs on 100-240v (universal) and main stand only runs on 110v (NA).

Does anyone know the point of the tongue mode being at the very bottom of the mode switch list? i brush my teeth and brush my tongue so the tongue mode should have been immediately after the regular brush mode

a few days use on a single charge. great build. grippy soft handle.

reviews.title: Some new features, brush works well.
reviews.text: This toothbrush is much like my old one, only this one is black. It does have a blue tooth thing that is so-so. It was a little cumbersome to get the app to work, (and had to get a new phone). The interaction between myself, the tooth brush, and the phone seems to be lacking. I envisioned real time brushing animation or something. This just times you through the selected areas. It is nice to get the bushing too hard feature well to know its there, and works. I miss the second speed my old one had this one only has one speed. I like that I can use my phone to help to remind me of my brushing responsibilities. The travel case is a nice feature as well. The design and function of this brush works well as does my old one. I was just expecting something a little more.

reviews.title: Very Good
reviews.text: Product arrived in time and exactly as presented on amazon

reviews.title: powerful toothbrush but a bit gimmicky
reviews.text:
I upgraded to this toothbrush from a vibrating-head type. The difference in cleaning-power feels dramatic. It has several different speeds for brushing teeth, gums, tongue, etc. By default, the light will blink and the toothbrush pause at certain intervals to ensure you spend enough time brushing different areas. This can be further customized with the Bluetooth unit and application. This is a neat novelty, and may be good for encouraging children to learn to brush correctly. To be honest though, when in a rush in the morning, I am not likely to take the extra step of using a phone app while brushing my teeth, and I also prefer not to take up another plug, as it’s not integrated with the charging base.

Overall I like the toothbrush a lot, but next time around, I would likely get the less expensive model without the phone accessories.

title: PerioSciences White Care Oral Care Kit - Toothpaste, Mouthwash, Gel
features: For your oral health -​​ PerioSciences Whitening Oral Care System is a three-product system for daily use by individuals who undergo peroxide-based professional whitening or strips. The product trio can make teeth even brighter, soothe soft tissue, and restore pH balance in the mouth.

Natural ingredients - This dental care kit is made using our signature antioxidants and botanicals such as Phloretin, perilla seed extract, and hesperetin. The whitening toothpaste contains plasdone along with grapefruit seed extracts and micro-minerals to gently polish and thoroughly cleanse surface stains while removing unhealthy build-up.

Dentist recommended - PerioSciences has worked with dentists for over 10 years to perfect our formula containing scientifically proven ingredients that focus on the mouth's natural defense system. Our products are recommended and used by over 1000 dentists nationwide.

Easy to use - Brush teeth with AO ProToothpaste. Rinse with 1 tsp of AO ProRinse for up to 1 minute then spit out. Apply a pea-sized amount of AO ProVantage Gel to gums using a fingertip or cotton swab, let gel dissolve, then spit out. Do not eat or drink for 30 minutes after application.

Redefining Oral Care with Antioxidants - PerioSciences believes in harnessing the power of nature using antioxidants and science in a novel dual approach by using ingredients known to have properties that keep your oral health and your smile at its best.

reviews.title: cleans my teeth well
reviews.text: Love this set, it cleans and freshens my breath.  My teeth feel cleaner longer than with regular toothpaste.  My breath stays fresh all day.  the mouthwash does not burn and the paste is gel like and it does not taste good or bad.

reviews.title: Synergistic formulation
reviews.text:
Excellent at controlling bad breath.
Especially for those of us who have a dry mouth, be it through illness or medications, I can tell you that this product is excellent and that area.
I used it during a time when I also had some mouth irritation. I feel that it helped to heal without any sting.

reviews.title: great set of premium oral care products
reviews.text: It seems like a lot of oral care companies are now going more high end, as I am starting to see toothpaste for over $10 when you can get "normal" toothpaste at the drugstore for $1-$2 (with a coupon). I was drawn to this because it is fluoride free. The toothpaste is nice and minty fresh, my mouth felt clean and fresh afterwards. I know that the brownish colored toothpaste may bother some people but I have used herbal toothpaste before so no color is "weird" or off limits for me - as long as they taste fine. There's even a few brands out there that has black colored paste! I really like the mouthwash as well and I'm surprised it is alcohol free because I feel like it does as good of a job as an alcohol one that I just recently purchased - minus the burn. My mouth just smelled and felt amazing after using both. I wasn't as fond of the dental gel as I found it useless and not something I would want to use much of. Overall this is a very nice set of oral care products and I would highly recommend the toothpaste and the mouth wash. I personally would repurchase the toothpaste and mouthwash - I hope they have a set with just those two items.

title: Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush With Supersoft Bristles, Pink/White
description: The Dr. Collins Perio Toothbrush is unlike any other toothbrush on the market. With its innovative, patented tapering technique, the Perio Toothbrush features super slim polyester bristles that penetrate further between the teeth to remove plaque and debris. The Perio Toothbrush bristles are also ultra soft, reducing the likelihood of abrasion and recession while simultaneously allowing gentle gum stimulation. The polyester bristles of the Perio Toothbrush are less porous, creating a more hygienic brushing experience. The bristle also lasts approximately 50% longer than a standard nylon toothbrush. The Perio Toothbrush is great for all ages, including those undergoing orthodontic treatment, suffering from sensitivity or gum recession.

reviews.title: Very soft, feels effective too
reviews.text: This is the softest toothbrush i have ever used.  I grew up believing that the harder the brush, the better for your teeth.  Now that i have almost no enamel left on my teeth i'm beginning to believe that softer might have been better all along.  These are super soft and almost fun to brush with.  I also bought the new Crest "chocolate" toothpaste!  If you're looking for a gentle and soft toothbrush, this is the one!

reviews.title: Excellent!
reviews.text: This toothbrush is the best brush out there imo. First of all, this brush only comes in a compact size, which is the size most people should be using (versus full). Second, the bristles are very soft and gentle and are all the same length... there is no scratchy feel like with some other brushes that have various length bristles to reach further under the gumline. These bristles are very gentle on gums yet clean them well. The best thing is that the brush really cleans the teeth. In my experience this toothbrush cleans better that the oral b line, better than mentadent pro care, better than reach, and better than the butler gum summit which has similar tapered bristles. This is a very good toothbrush that gets the job done gently but very effectively.

reviews.title: Battery life is NOT what it claims
reviews.text: I've been trying to give this toothbrush the benefit of the doubt, but I give up. I charge it, and for 15 seconds it runs full strength, then slowly declines like my older brush was doing, not holding a charge. Not sure when this was manufactured, or how old the battery is, but it's not holding a charge. It will not run for 365 days on one charge, that's for sure. I will have to return.

reviews.title: Worth every cent
reviews.text: Works wonderfully . Especially for the price

reviews.title: 8 Heads more important than you might think
reviews.text:
I've been trying a bunch of similar toothbrushes lately. First off, most of the brands do not have interchangeable heads, so many of these will end up getting thrown out once the heads are used. For that reason, getting 8 heads with this is an important feature, because at least for the current price, you could hardly buy 8 disposable brushes.

One of the things I like about some others is when they have an induction charger that also acts like a little dock (of those, I prefer the ones with a USB plug rather than an AC plug). Those normally charge a premium, but this one is inexpensive, so at least they have that going for it. It's not like you have to charge it often (although definitely more than once a year), but laying a toothbrush down to plug it in is cumbersome, and it takes a while to charge.

I don't want or need the 30/120 second timers, but every single one I've ever seen (of the "sonic" type) has had that, so how can I complain? I end up brushing for 6-10 minutes most of the time.

Not a bad version of the less expensive off-brand options, but I don't think anyone can predict the future as to if and for how long replacement heads will be available.

description: Remove plaque and experience a deep, effective clean with Sonicare technology, removing up to 5x-7x more plaque vs. a manual toothbrush. Sonicare technology gently pulses water between your teeth, for a month's worth of manual brushing in just 2 minutes. The QuadPacer lets you know when you've spent the optimal amount of time on each section of your mouth while the SmarTimer signals when your 2 minutes is up. The pressure sensor flashes red to remind you to ease off, helping to prevent gum recession, while the 2 intensity settings ensure a comfortable clean that’s right for you. Going electric might feel like a big step, but with this brush you’re in safe hands. Its slim ergonomic design and familiar-shaped head gives you everything you need for an effective clean. The kit includes 1 Philips Sonicare 4100 electric toothbrush, 1 Optimal Plaque Control (C2) brush head and 1 USB charger (wall adaptor not included). title: 100 Pack Toothbrush Standard Classic Medium Soft Toothbrush Bulk Individually Wrapped
features: INDIVIDUALLY WRAPPED: Each medium soft toothbrush is individually wrapped in a paper casing. Toothbrush Height: 7 Inches. This ensures that the toothbrushes are well protected from germs and bacteria and can be easily redistributed. These manual toothbrushes design with ergonomic shape and grip handle for maximum control while brushing. A great low cost option for everyday use or for those ones and done circumstances.

MEDIUM SOFT BRISTLES: Medium soft toothbrush bristles are made soft to the touch to prevent any damage from being done to the enamel of your teeth when removing plaque. Brush away & feel the difference!

STANDARD SIZE: These medium soft toothbrush are standard sized. They are intended for adults but children can use them as well. Each Pack oral toothbrush comes with a variety of colors so you don’t mistake your brush with your friends or family members. Give your favorite color to your family member or pass this along to a friend when going on adventures.

WHOLESALE TOOTHBRUSHES: There are so many uses for toothbrushes in bulk quantity. Commercially, they can be redistributed in hotels, Airbnb apartments, dental offices, community events, school rooms, to the homeless and the needy, and hygiene drives. They are also great for personal use if you are a frequent traveler, or are in the habit of disposing of your toothbrushes often.

PERFECT TRAVEL TOOTHBRUSH: Our disposable manual toothbrushes pack is perfect for traveling, camping, business trips and those on the go. Use them as little or as long as you’d like and toss them out when you’re done! This makes them extremely convenient for everyday use or buy as wholesale toothbrush for donation.

reviews.title: Love buying quality in bulk!
reviews.text: These toothbrushes are hard bristle though very sturdy! And such a deal for the price for the amount and quality of the item!! It is hard to separate the toothbrushes by hand, deft need scissors. But aside from that one minor drawback, they're perfect!

reviews.title: Great value
reviews.text: Great value, cute packageing. Great for travel or guests.

reviews.title: Nice quality and colors
reviews.text: Bought these to pack in hygiene kits for people in crisis, so they had to be individually wrapped to keep them hygienic and clean. They came in strips of 10 with perforations in between to separate each toothbrush. unfortunately, some of the seals between the toothbrushes split open when I cut them apart. I did not "tear" them apart, I very carefully cut them apart with long scissors, but the seal just wasn't good enough to hold. Maybe 4 out of 50 weren't usable because of this, which is unfortunate as we needed all 50. The price point was so reasonable, though, that this flaw could be forgiven.

reviews.title: Thumbs up
reviews.text: Used these as gifts for goodies bags for our women’s conference.

reviews.title: Good AND bad!!
reviews.text: They work but only lasts for like 3 uses, BUT at this price I like a new brush every 3 uses snyway so thats it! If you are looking for a brush that lasts a month (yuck) this aint it but if you want a fresh brush every couple days go for it.
